critique: Step 1: The explanation equates “at least 3 days” with times starting only with “3:”. This is logically flawed because “at least 3 days” should include any duration starting with 3:, 4:, 5:, etc. While in this dataset all qualifying times happen to start with 3:, the selection criterion is incomplete. Step 1 is incorrect.
